ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "disclaimer" TEXT /* Disclaimer associated with the page's ads */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page on the social media platform */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., business, personal, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "page_id" TEXT /* ID of the page that ran the ad campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the ad campaign */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the campaign is run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation, conversions) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "ad_spend_to_date" TEXT /* Total amount spent on the campaign to date */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client who owns the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign that ran the ad */,
  "ad_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the ad */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the ad */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions generated by the ad */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the ad is run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ad was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ad performance metrics */,
  "click_through_rate" TEXT /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the ad */,
  "cost_per_click" TEXT /* Cost per click (CPC) of the ad */,
  "cost_per_conversion" TEXT /* Cost per conversion (CPA) of the ad */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who saw the ad */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the ad (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targeting_options" (
  "targeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign that used the targeting option */,
  "targeting_name" TEXT /* Name of the targeting option (e.g., location, interests) */,
  "targeting_value" TEXT /* Value of the targeting option (e.g., New York, hiking) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the targeting option is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the targeting option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the targeting option */,
  "targeting_type" TEXT /* Type of targeting (e.g., demographic, interest-based, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targeting_options_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_spend" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad spend record */,
  "page_id" TEXT /* ID of the page that spent the ad budget */,
  "amount_spent" TEXT /* Amount spent by the page on ads */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the ad spend is recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ad spend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ad spend record */,
  "spend_date" TEXT /* Date when the amount was spent */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the amount spent */,
  "spend_type" TEXT /* Type of spend (e.g., ad creation, ad delivery, ad optimization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_spend_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads_in_library" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad library record */,
  "page_id" TEXT /* ID of the page that has ads in the ad library */,
  "num_ads" INTEGER /* Number of ads in the ad library for the page */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the ads are stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ad library record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ad library record */,
  "active_ads" INTEGER /* Number of active ads in the library */,
  "archived_ads" INTEGER /* Number of archived ads in the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_in_library_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)
